input.background: Independent observations from a population with a given probability density function.
input.question: Find the maximum likelihood estimator of $\theta$ if $\mathrm{t}_1, \mathrm{t}_2, \ldots, \mathrm{t}_{\mathrm{n}}$ are independent observations from a population with the following probability density function $$f(t ; \theta)=\frac{\theta}{t^{\theta+1}} \text { for } t \geq 1, \theta>0$$.
